title: Default
objective: Start the default workstream for Meeting Ingest.
status_summary: Addressed Claude review findings for session-inbox wrapper. Added top-level allow_session_provider gate before scanning/extractor use. Existing handoffs whose inbox source is missing or hash-mismatched now report non-failing stale_handoff with cleanup guidance instead of poisoning the batch. Added tests for out-of-inbox stale requests, disabled-gate extractor prevention, extractor failure, missing-source stale handling, and existing ready/missing response resume behavior. Documented session-inbox JSON contract, phase1 fields, stale_handoff, inbox-scoped planner limits, and corrected retry-pair language in provider-handoff-contract. Synced AGENTS.md, workflow docs, and Codex/Claude skill sources/installed copies. Verification: uv run pytest => 129 passed; py_compile passed; git diff --check passed.
next_actions: Next action: optionally run a second Claude review on the fixed working tree, then review .iq-context state and commit if clean. Potential later slice: expose the pending handoff planner through status/doctor.
continuation_hint: Next: Next action: optionally run a second Claude review on the fixed working tree, then review .iq-context state and commit if clean. Potential later slice: expose the pending handoff planner through status/doctor.
